what time is it: What time is it? means Que horas são? ⏰

it's seven o'clock: It's seven o'clock means São sete horas 🕖
it's eight o'clock: It's eight o'clock means São oito horas 🕗
it's nine o'clock: It's nine o'clock means São nove horas 🕘
